name: What proof do I need for my slip and fall at work claim?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my slip and fall at work claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medical records, witnesses, reports proving hazard and injury link.
acceptedAnswer.description: Gather incident report, medical records linking injury to fall, witness statements, photos of hazard, and employer maintenance logs showing notice. Proves work-relatedness and extent[1][7]. Key factors: Timestamped photos, video if available, pre/post-injury wage docs. Request OSHA logs if applicable. Avoid erasing security footage—demand preservation. Attorney subpoenas records.

description: Photos, medical records, witnesses, reports proving hazard and injury link.
